description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved pertuzumab / trastuzumab (phesgo) in combination with carboplatin and docetaxel (TCHP) for reimbursement as a treatment option for the neoadjuvant treatment of HER2-positive locally advanced, inflammatory, or early breast cancer at high risk of recurrence in adult patients.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

indication.indication: Neoadjuvant treatment of adult patients with HER2-positive locally advanced, inflammatory or early breast cancer at high risk of recurrence.
indication.description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved pertuzumab / trastuzumab (phesgo) in combination with carboplatin and docetaxel (TCHP) for reimbursement as a treatment option for the neoadjuvant treatment of HER2-positive locally advanced, inflammatory, or early breast cancer at high risk of recurrence in adult patients.
indication.raw_cancer_type: locally advanced, inflammatory, or early stage breast cancer
